title: ChoiceCardData
description: Data payload for a `choice` card (CardEnvelope.data when type='choice'). A single-select 'pick one of N rich options' card; activating an option emits the `action` verb.

prompt.description: Optional question/body text rendered above the options. Distinct from CardEnvelope.title (the card chrome heading).

submitLabel.description: Label for the Submit button; default 'Submit'.

options.description: The selectable options, rendered in order. Exactly one can be chosen.

id.description: Emitted as CardEvent.action. Must be unique within `options`. (The reserved id '__other__' is used by the allowOther escape.)

description.description: Optional secondary line under the label.

media.description: Optional leading media: an image URL or a named icon.

image.description: Image URL rendered as a leading thumbnail in the row.

imageAlt.description: Accessible alt text for `image` (decorative if omitted).

icon.description: Named icon rendered as a leading glyph.

meta.description: Trailing freeform text (e.g. a price or badge), right-aligned in the row.

recommended.description: Renders a small 'Recommended' pill near the label.

disabled.description: Option is shown but not selectable, and skipped in keyboard nav.

payload.description: Optional opaque payload echoed back in CardEvent.payload (any JSON).

allowOther.description: Optional free-text escape ('none of these / specify'). `true` appends a final 'Other…' option; an object customizes its `label`/`placeholder`. Selecting it reveals a text input; the shared Submit button then emits `{ kind:'action', action:'__other__', payload:{ text } }`.
